videos.headline: Jalen Milroe shines with 4 rushing TDs in Bama's blowout win
videos.description: Jalen Milroe rushes for 185 yards and tacks on four rushing touchdowns as Alabama takes down LSU 42-13 in a dominant road win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Jalen Milroe shines with 4 rushing TDs in Bama's blowout win) 2024/11/10 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe finds a seam and takes off for a 39-yard Alabama TD
videos.description: Alabama gets on the board first as Jalen Milroe escapes the pocket and houses a 39-yard rushing touchdown against LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe finds a seam and takes off for a 39-yard Alabama TD) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: Justice Haynes powers into end zone to extend Bama's lead
videos.description: Justice Haynes' second effort into the end zone gives Alabama an early 14-3 lead over LSU in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justice Haynes powers into end zone to extend Bama's lead) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: Bama forces timely turnover as LSU's Nussmeier loses fumble
videos.description: Alabama comes away with a clutch turnover late in the second quarter after Jihaad Campbell forces a fumble on LSU's Garrett Nussmeier following a sack.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bama forces timely turnover as LSU's Nussmeier loses fumble) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe dodges defenders for 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Jalen Milroe weaves through traffic en route to his second rushing score as Alabama extends their lead late in the second quarter against LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe dodges defenders for 2nd rushing TD) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: LSU's Garrett Nussmeier throws critical goal-line INT
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier fails to connect with his receiver and throws a costly interception at the goal line to prevent LSU from scoring against Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU's Garrett Nussmeier throws critical goal-line INT) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: LSU crowd trashes end zone after costly penalty vs. Alabama
videos.description: Attendees in the LSU crowd toss garbage into the end zone after the Tigers get called for a facemask penalty on the previous play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU crowd trashes end zone after costly penalty vs. Alabama) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe's rushing TD hat trick puts Bama up big
videos.description: Jalen Milroe refuses to be tackled on a 19-yard score to pick up his third rushing touchdown of the game and pad Alabama's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe's rushing TD hat trick puts Bama up big) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe's electric 72-yard dash leads to 4th rushing TD
videos.description: Alabama's Jalen Milroe picks up his fourth rushing touchdown of the game against LSU with a must-see 72-yard sprint into the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe's electric 72-yard dash leads to 4th rushing TD) 2024/11/9

videos.headline: Richard Young waltzes into end zone to ice Bama's victory
videos.description: Richard Young glides untouched into the end zone to push Alabama's lead to 42-6 over LSU.
